title: UpdateConnectorRegistrationRequest
description: UpdateConnectorRegistrationRequest schema from Amazon AppFlow API

connectorLabel.description: The name of the connector. The name is unique for each ConnectorRegistration in your Amazon Web Services account.

description.description: A description about the update that you're making to the connector.

lambdaArn.description: Lambda ARN of the connector being registered.

connectorProvisioningConfig.description: The provisioning type of the connector.
